error.invalid_auth: API key rejected — see error details below. Submit again to save anyway.
error.cannot_connect: Connection issue — see details below. Submit again to save anyway.
error.no_printers: Connected but no printers found. See details below.

user.title: Prusa Connect
user.description: Choose how to connect to your Prusa printer.

local.title: PrusaLink (Local Connection)
local.description:
Connect directly to your printer on the local network.

Find the API key in your printer's web interface at **http://your-printer-ip** → Settings → API Key.

cloud.title: Prusa Connect (Cloud)
cloud.description:
Connect via the Prusa Connect cloud at [{prusa_connect_url}]({prusa_connect_url}).

The API key is per-printer. Find both values at connect.prusa3d.com → select your printer → Settings tab.

data.printer_uuid: Printer UUID (from URL or settings page)

init.title: Prusa Connect Configuration
init.description: Update your connection settings. Changes will reload the integration automatically.
